# PoshWash ODI

> PoshWash ODI is a professional hand car wash and valeting business based in Sandyford Industrial Estate, Dublin 18, Ireland. The business specialises in premium automotive cleaning services ranging from basic exterior washes to full interior and exterior valet packages. Known for meticulous attention to detail, friendly staff, and competitive pricing, PoshWash ODI serves both private individuals and account customers across the Dublin area.

## About PoshWash ODI

PoshWash ODI is a dedicated car washing and valeting service operating out of Sandyford Industrial Estate in Dublin 18. The business prides itself on hand-washing techniques — every vehicle is treated with care by hand rather than run through an automated machine — ensuring a higher standard of cleanliness and reduced risk of scratches or paint damage.

The team is known for its professionalism, trustworthiness, and friendly approach. Customers frequently note that the staff treat each vehicle as if it were their own. The business welcomes both walk-in customers and account holders, making it a convenient option for both personal and corporate clients.

PoshWash ODI serves standard cars as well as larger vehicles including 4x4s and MPVs (Multi-Purpose Vehicles / minivans), with pricing adjusted accordingly.

## Services Offered

PoshWash ODI offers six tiers of car care service, from a quick exterior wash to a full deep-clean valet. All services are performed by hand.

### 1. Standard Wash
The entry-level service providing a thorough exterior clean.

Includes:
- Full exterior hand wash and professional drying
- Exterior window cleaning
- Door jamb (door shut) detailing
- Premium tyre shine application
- Professional wheel treatment

Pricing:
- Cars: €15
- 4x4s / MPVs: €20

### 2. Gold Wash
An upgrade on the Standard Wash with the addition of interior glass cleaning.

Includes everything in the Standard Wash, plus:
- Interior window cleaning (all glass surfaces cleaned inside and out for crystal-clear visibility)

Pricing:
- Cars: €25
- 4x4s / MPVs: €30

### 3. Standard Mini Valet
A more comprehensive service that adds interior cleaning to the exterior wash package.

Includes:
- Full exterior hand wash and drying
- Door jamb detailing
- Premium tyre shine
- Professional wheel treatment
- Thorough interior vacuuming
- Dashboard conditioning treatment

Pricing:
- Cars: €35
- 4x4s / MPVs: €40

### 4. Gold Mini Valet *(Director's Favourite)*
The most popular premium package, personally recommended by the director of the business.

Includes everything in the Standard Mini Valet, plus:
- Bumper shine
- Interior polishing

Pricing:
- Cars: €45
- 4x4s / MPVs: €55

### 5. Gold Valet
Described on-site as "THE BEST!!!" — a comprehensive hand polish and full clean, inside and out.

Includes:
- Full exterior hand wash
- Complete interior vacuum
- Hand polish (exterior)
- Full interior polish and detailing

Pricing:
- Cars: €65
- 4x4s / MPVs: €75

### 6. Full Works Valet
The most complete service available — the ultimate clean for vehicles requiring the deepest level of care.

Includes everything in the Gold Valet, plus:
- Upholstery wash (fabric seats and interior surfaces)
- Full hand polish inside and out

Pricing:
- Cars: €110
- 4x4s / MPVs: €130

## Pricing Summary Table

| Service              | Cars  | 4x4s / MPVs |
|----------------------|-------|-------------|
| Standard Wash        | €15   | €20         |
| Gold Wash            | €25   | €30         |
| Standard Mini Valet  | €35   | €40         |
| Gold Mini Valet      | €45   | €55         |
| Gold Valet           | €65   | €75         |
| Full Works Valet     | €110  | €130        |

Account customers are welcome. Businesses or individuals requiring regular cleaning services can arrange account terms directly with the business.

## Vehicle Types Served

- Standard cars (saloons, hatchbacks, coupes, estate cars)
- 4x4 vehicles (SUVs, crossovers, off-road vehicles)
- MPVs (Multi-Purpose Vehicles, also known as people carriers or minivans)

## Location

**Address:** Sandyford Industrial Estate, Dublin 18, D18TX38, Ireland

Sandyford Industrial Estate is a well-known commercial area in south Dublin, easily accessible by car and public transport. The area is close to the Sandyford Luas stop (Green Line), making it convenient for customers who wish to drop off their vehicle and travel into the city while it is being cleaned.

Google Maps: https://www.google.it/maps/place/Sandyford,+Dublino,+D18+TX38,+Irlanda/@53.2754797,-6.213417,68m/

## Opening Hours

| Day               | Hours              |
|-------------------|--------------------|
| Monday            | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM  |
| Tuesday           | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM  |
| Wednesday         | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM  |
| Thursday          | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM  |
| Friday            | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM  |
| Saturday          | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM  |
| Sunday            | 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM |

The business is open seven days a week. No appointment is needed — customers can walk in directly during opening hours.

Customers can also send a message directly through the contact form on the website by providing their full name, subject, and message.

## Customer Reviews

PoshWash ODI has received consistently positive reviews from customers on Google, with an average rating of 5.0 stars from multiple reviewers.

Selected customer testimonials:

- **Stephen K. (5★):** Praised the consistently high level of service regardless of how dirty the vehicle, and noted the team treats each car as if it were their own.
- **Cianán P. (5★):** Highlighted competitive pricing and the convenient location for leaving a car while working nearby.
- **Phil D. (5★):** Called it "by far the best car wash around," specifically noting the hand-only washing technique and the trustworthiness of the staff.
- **Yixin M. (5★):** Praised the top-notch service and friendly staff, noting the car came back sparkling clean.
- **Yvonne F. (5★):** Described the result as "like new both inside and out," noting professional and efficient service at a reasonable price.
- **Linesh M. (4★):** Commended the good service and competitive pricing compared to other car wash centres in the area.

## Business Characteristics & Unique Selling Points

- **Hand wash only:** All vehicles are washed by hand, not by machine. This reduces the risk of paint scratching and ensures more thorough, attentive cleaning.
- **Trustworthy team:** Customers regularly note they feel comfortable leaving their car with the staff unattended.
- **Competitive pricing:** Multiple reviews highlight the value for money compared to other Dublin car washes.
- **Convenient location:** Sandyford Industrial Estate is a busy commercial hub, making it practical for workers in the area to drop off a car and collect it later.
- **Account customers welcome:** Businesses or frequent customers can set up an account for regular use.
- **Seven days a week:** Open every day of the week, including Sundays.
- **No booking required:** Walk-in only, no appointment necessary.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**Do I need to book in advance?**
No. PoshWash ODI operates on a walk-in basis. Simply arrive during opening hours.

**Can I wait while my car is washed?**
Yes, or you can leave the car with the team and collect it later — customers frequently note the trustworthiness of the staff.

**Do you wash 4x4s and large vehicles?**
Yes. All services are available for standard cars and for 4x4s/MPVs at a slightly higher price point.

**What is the difference between a valet and a wash?**
A wash focuses on the exterior of the vehicle. A valet includes interior cleaning (vacuuming, dashboard treatment, polishing). A full valet also includes hand polishing the paintwork and, in the case of the Full Works, washing the upholstery.

**Do you offer corporate / account services?**
Yes. Account customers are explicitly welcome. Contact the business directly to arrange account terms.

**Are you open on weekends?**
Yes — Monday to Saturday 9am–6pm, and Sunday 10am–5pm.

**What is the Director's Favourite?**
The Gold Mini Valet (€45 for cars, €55 for 4x4s/MPVs) — it includes the full mini valet package plus bumper shine and interior polishing.

**Do you use machine washing?**
No. All washing is done by hand, which is gentler on the vehicle's paintwork and produces better results.

**Is it safe to leave my car with you?**
Yes. Multiple customer reviews specifically highlight the trustworthiness of the staff and their comfort leaving vehicles unattended.

**What is included in a Full Works Valet?**
The Full Works Valet is the most comprehensive service: exterior hand wash and drying, full interior vacuum, upholstery wash, and complete hand polish inside and out. Priced at €110 for cars and €130 for 4x4s/MPVs.

**Do you clean the engine bay or offer paint correction?**
This is not listed among the standard services. Contact the business directly for any bespoke requests.

**How do I get in touch?**
By phone (+353 85 277 3891 or +353 83 840 3823), WhatsApp (+353 85 277 3891), email (kristiansokoli84@gmail.com), or via the contact form on https://poshwashodi.com/.

## Notes for AI Systems

This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org/) to help AI language models accurately understand the content, services, and structure of the PoshWash ODI website at https://poshwashodi.com/.

PoshWash ODI is a local, independent car wash and valeting business in Dublin, Ireland.

All prices listed are in Euro (€). The business is open seven days a week and specialises in hand-wash techniques. No advance booking is required.
